privileged_info_summary: This task uses GCompris Qt, a real, open-source educational software suite licensed under AGPL-3.0, available in Ubuntu repositories. The task leverages the 'Puzzle of famous paintings' activity which exists in GCompris as a confirmed feature. The data is not synthetic—it comes from the actual GCompris application's built-in content libraries. The agent is expected to save two output files: a screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/painting_solved.png and painting information text to /home/ga/Documents/painting_info.txt. These file paths are standard Linux paths in the user's Documents directory.
